name: Breadbasket
description:
Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +55% (70%) headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s.
Max stack is 3 (2).

name: Killer
description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +70% (90%) critical hit damage for 10s.

name: Preservation
description: Killing an enemy repairs 10% (15%) armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 10% (15%)

name: Optimist
description: Weapon damage is increased by +3.5% (4.5%) for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

name: Strained
description:
Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing.
Stacks up to 5 (8) times.

name: Close & Personal
description: Killing a target within 7m grants +30% (38%) weapon damage for 10s.

name: Fast Hands
description: Critical hits add a stack of 3% (5%) reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

name: Sadist
description:
Amplifies +30% (35%) weapon damage to bleeding enemies.
After 4 (3) kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.

name: Eyeless
description:
Amplifies +30% (35%) weapon damage to blinded enemies.
After 4 (3) kills, applies blind to the next enemy you hit.

name: Ignited
description:
Amplifies +25% (30%) weapon damage to burning enemies. 
After 4 (3) kills, applies burning to the next enemy you hit.

name: Vindictive
description: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants you and all allies within 15m (20m) 16% (21%) Critical hit chance and 16% (21%) critical hit damage for 20s.

name: Ranger
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 4m (3m) you are away from your target.

name: Steady Handed
description:
Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability.
At 100 (75) stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.

name: Spike
description: Headshots grant +20% (25%) skill damage for 15s.

name: Perpetuation
description: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 20s (16s).

name: Reformation
description: Headshots grant +60% (80%) skill repair for 15s.

name: Future Perfect
description:
Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 15s (19s). Stacks up to 3 (4) times.
Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s.
Overcharge Cooldown: 90s

name: Flatline
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% (20%) to pulsed enemies. After 4 (3) kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

name: Sledgehammer
description:
Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target.
Targets with mark will take 15% (20%) more damage to armor from the agent that applied the mark and have a -20% (30%) movement speed.
Mark will disappear after 10 seconds. (As of TU 22.2 the marked targets take the Amp damage from all sources including other agents)
multiplier: Amplifier but only vs Armor/ armor plates

name: Thunder Strike
description: Amplifies 30% (35%) extra damage to shocked targets. After 4 (3) kills, applies shock to the next enemy you hit.

name: In Sync
description:
Hitting an enemy grants +15% (20%) skill damage for 5s.
Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +15% (20%) weapon damage for 5s.
Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.

name: Pressure Point
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% (20%) to enemies under status effects.

name: Streamline
description: Increase Weapon Damage by 42% (47%)  (32%/37%) when no Skills are Deployed or on Cooldown.

name: Immobilize
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% (25%) to ensared enemies. After 4 (3) kills applies Ensnare to the next enemy you hit.

name: Soft Spot
description: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 19% (24%) Weapon Damage for 15s.

name: Rifleman
description:
Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +10% (11%) weapon damage for 5s. 
Max stack is 5 (6).
Additional headshots refresh the duration.

name: Boomerang
description:
Critical hits have a 50% (75%) chance to return the bullet to the magazine.
If a bullet is returned to the magazine the next shot gains 40% (50%) increased damage.

name: Lucky Shot
description:
Magazine capacity is increased by 20% (30%).
Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

name: Determined
description: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed (critical) headshot.

name: Behind You
description: Amplifies weapon damage by +20% (25%) to enemies that are not targeting you.

name: Precision Strike
description: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 3. Hittting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide 20% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.

name: Near Sighted
description: Receive +80% (100%) stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.

name: On Empty
description: Reloading from empty grants +60% (80%) weapon handling for 10s.

name: Measured
description:
The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -25% (30%) weapon damage.
The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +30% (38%) total weapon damage.
multiplier:
1) ROF / Weapon Damage
2) ROF / Total Weapon Damage

name: Overflowing
description: Every 3 (2) reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

name: Stabilize
description: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 60%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 4 seconds.

name: Naked
description: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 5s (8s).

name: First Blood
description:
If scoped, your first (2) shot fired(s) from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit.
Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.

name: Outsider
description: After killing an enemy, gain 100% (150%) optimal range and +100% (125%) accuracy for 10s.

name: Unwavering
description:
Swapping to this weapon grants +300% (400%) weapon handling for 5s.
Kills refresh the buff.
Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.

name: Unhinged
description: Grants +18% (22%) weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.

name: Frenzy
description: For every 10 (8) bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.

name: Overwhelm
description:
Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +10% (12%) weapon damage for 12 seconds.
Max stack is 4.

name: Pummel
description: 3 (2) consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Pumped Up
description: Reloading grants +1.2% (6%) weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 25 (5) times.

name: Brazen
description: Receive +3.5% (2%/3%) Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 6 (4) pellets hit.
multiplier:
Amplifier, stacks additively
1 + 0.035 * n, n is from 6 (4) to 8

name: Salvage
description: Killing a target has a +70% (85%) chance to refill the magazine.

name: Finisher
description: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 30% (35%) critical hit chance and 30% (40%) critical hit damage for 15s.
